Sign in | Amazon.jobs | Navigation
Seattle, WA | Arlington, VA
$165,500 - $288,400/year

Description

You will own one or more products in production and bring Agentic AI to developers worldwide. You will be responsible for revenue and adoption of the services.

Key job responsibilities

  • Lead product definition and customer working backwards strategy
  • Define product vision including roadmap, investment, and experimentation
  • Lead product launch and GTM plans
  • Business reporting on revenue and adoption

Basic Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree or equivalent
  • 10+ years of end to end product delivery experience
  • 8+ years of technical product or program management experience
  • Experience with feature delivery and tradeoffs of a product

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in AI/ML product management
  • MBA or advanced degree
  • Experience driving multi-year product strategies
